'''Mon Eron''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]]. It was settled by members of the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Species/Legends|species]] around [[4400 BBY]]. The colonists eventually [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] the planet's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]].<ref name="Strongholds">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref> It was orbited by two [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" /> and contained [[Forest/Legends|forests]].<ref name="Constant Vigilance">{{SWIA|set=Return to Hoth|mission=Constant Vigilance}}</ref>
